_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of program protection plan (PPP) principles and practices
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of Data Protection Impact Assessment requirements, including regulatory triggers that mandate a DPIA, mandatory assessment elements, supervisory authority consultation obligations, and documentation standards.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI RC domain. Knowledge RC-K-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-K-009 (SP, cosine: 0.458), OP-T-003 (OP, cosine: 0.458).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: Moderate similarity (4.5/10). The cross-encoder finds meaningful but bounded overlap — consistent with cross-framework mapping between cybersecurity and data/AI domains where shared governance concepts use different terminology.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: Moderate token-level alignment (F1=0.873). Precision exceeds Recall (P=0.889 > R=0.858), indicating the NICE element's semantic content is more tightly aligned with the KSA than the reverse.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: Neutral-dominant (99.3%). The model finds the descriptions related but neither implying nor contradicting each other — typical for cross-domain framework mapping where concepts overlap without strict logical implication.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder (0.472) closely tracks STS (0.446). The small gap (0.026) indicates the relationship is capturable through independent encoding — shared surface semantics align with cross-attention analysis.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Low lexical overlap (14.3%). Limited shared vocabulary — the relationship is primarily semantic rather than terminological.
